patch:
--- a/alu_control.v
+++ b/alu_control.v
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
   output reg [63:0] alu_result
 );
 
-  always @(opcode) begin
+  always @(opcode or operand_x or operand_y) begin
     case(opcode)
       4'b0000: alu_result = operand_x + operand_y;  // ADD
       4'b0001: alu_result = operand_x - operand_y;  // SUB
before_code:
module alu_control(
  input [3:0] opcode,
  input [63:0] operand_x,
  input [63:0] operand_y,
  output reg [63:0] alu_result
);

  always @(opcode) begin
    case(opcode)
      4'b0000: alu_result = operand_x + operand_y;  // ADD
      4'b0001: alu_result = operand_x - operand_y;  // SUB
      4'b0010: alu_result = operand_x & operand_y;  // AND
      4'b0011: alu_result = operand_x | operand_y;  // OR
      4'b0100: alu_result = operand_x ^ operand_y;  // XOR
      default: alu_result = 64'h0;
    endcase
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module alu_control(
  input [3:0] opcode,
  input [63:0] operand_x,
  input [63:0] operand_y,
  output reg [63:0] alu_result
);

  always @(opcode or operand_x or operand_y) begin
    case(opcode)
      4'b0000: alu_result = operand_x + operand_y;  // ADD
      4'b0001: alu_result = operand_x - operand_y;  // SUB
      4'b0010: alu_result = operand_x & operand_y;  // AND
      4'b0011: alu_result = operand_x | operand_y;  // OR
      4'b0100: alu_result = operand_x ^ operand_y;  // XOR
      default: alu_result = 64'h0;
    endcase
  end

endmodule
